source_task_text: Determine whether a conference meeting may begin by independently evaluating observed room occupancy, expected attendance records, badge check-in status, and calendar participation updates. Reconcile conflicting evidence, identify unresolved issues, and generate a final meeting-readiness decision with confidence, evidence references, and limitations.
